mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ss_user ( USER_NO, USER_NICK, USER_EML_ADDR, USER_ENPSWD, USER_NM, USER_BRDT, USER_TELNO, USER_GNDR, USER_MNGR_YN, USER_REG, USER_REG_HM, USER_DEL_YN, USER_DRM_YN, USER_TAG, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR ) VALUES ( 985, #{userNick}, #{userEmlAddr}, #{userEnpswd}, #{userNm}, #{userBrdt}, #{userTelno}, #{userGndr}, 'N', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), 'N', 'N', #{userTag}, #{userZip}, #{userAddr}, #{userDaddr} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NICK, USER_EML_ADDR, USER_NM, USER_ENPSWD, USER_TELNO, USER_TAG, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR FROM ss_user WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
